item.title: Per-blueprint domain egress allowlists — blueprint-aware firewall defaults
item.intent: Each blueprint knows what services it needs. Firewall allowlist should be generated from the blueprint.
item.description: Clawdius recon (2026-03-29): domain allowlist per integration. FEAT-116 covers ipset but not per-blueprint defaults.
steps: Map integration types to required domains
Add doctor check for missing domains
acceptanceCriteria: Each blueprint compiles to a domain allowlist
